root_cause: Kubernetes object exceeds etcd size limit
evidence: Event indicates request entity too large
etcd rejected object due to size limit

causes.message: Kubernetes API attempted to persist object
Object exceeds maximum size allowed by etcd
API server rejected the object due to size limit

likely_causes: ConfigMap or Secret contains very large data
Application embedded large binary content in manifest
suggested_checks: Inspect ConfigMaps or Secrets referenced by the Pod
Check annotation sizes in the object manifest
